section.title: Team
section.subtitle: People Behind HUMACH
section.description: HUMACH Research brings together research leadership, collaborators, developers, students, interns, and future alumni through structured research and development pathways.

groups.name: Leadership & Direction
groups.summary: Sets the research vision, supervises projects, coordinates collaborations, and ensures that outputs are scientifically meaningful and practically useful.

groups.name: Researchers & Collaborators
groups.summary: Contribute to literature reviews, experiment design, model development, manuscript preparation, and interdisciplinary research translation.

groups.name: Development Contributors
groups.summary: Build dashboards, research tools, prototypes, data pipelines, documentation, and reproducible software components.

groups.name: Students, Interns & Alumni
groups.summary: Learn through milestone-based participation, project contribution, portfolio outputs, thesis work, and future alumni pathways.

items.name: Emran Ali
items.summary: PhD researcher and research-development lead specialising in AI, ML, deep learning, explainable AI, generative and agentic AI, health informatics, biomedical signal processing, sleep analysis, epilepsy, ageing, and air-quality analytics.
projects: Sleep dynamics and healthy ageing using hypnograms
EEG-based epileptic seizure detection and channel optimisation
GenAI and agentic AI for health and research workflows

items.name: Researchers & Collaborators
items.summary: Collaborators and researchers working across AI, data science, biomedical computing, human-centered systems, and applied computing projects.

items.name: Development Contributors
items.summary: Developers contributing to dashboards, research automation tools, web interfaces, APIs, visual analytics, documentation, and prototype systems.

items.name: Research Interns
items.summary: Interns join supervised research tasks such as reading, dataset preparation, experiments, result analysis, and manuscript-support activities.

items.name: Development Interns
items.summary: Development interns contribute to frontend pages, data-driven components, project documentation, UI improvements, and research software prototypes.

items.name: Future Alumni Network
items.summary: As HUMACH grows, completed interns, students, and collaborators can be listed as alumni with project contributions and outputs.
